<div align="center">

# Welcome

**Senior Software Engineer @ [NIQ](https://www.nielseniq.com/) · Paris, France**

*12+ years building software · Leading Digital Shelf AI projects*

</div>

---

### About Me

I'm a Senior Software Engineer at **NIQ**, where I lead the **Digital Shelf AI** initiatives — applying machine learning and AI to transform how brands compete on the digital shelf.

Before diving into AI-driven products, I spent years working in the **security** domain, building resilient and secure systems. With over **12 years** of professional experience, I've shipped production software across a wide range of domains and tech stacks.

---

---

### Open Source

For a long time, my focus was on proprietary work — and my GitHub didn't reflect what I actually do day-to-day. That's changing now.

I'm actively looking to **contribute to open source** projects where I can make a real impact — especially in areas around:

- 🦀 **Rust** ecosystem & tooling
- 🌐 **WebAssembly** runtimes and frameworks
- 🔒 **Security** tooling
- 🤖 **AI / ML** infrastructure

If you maintain a project in any of these spaces and could use a hand, feel free to reach out — I'd love to collaborate.
